title: ACTREC Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Assistant Medical Administrator Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Assistant Medical Administrator Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the MBBS, BDS, MD/ MS, DNB, and Post Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the ACTREC Notification 2026 . Here we mentioned more information about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for...
